description: PostgreSQL persist client generation - generate from selected tables
name: testdb

sample-project/Ballerina.toml.newText:
[[tool.persist]]
id = "employees"
targetModule = "employees"
filePath = "persist/model.bal"
options.datastore = "postgresql"
options.eagerLoading = true

sample-project/connections.bal.newText:
import sample_project.employees;

final employees:Client testdb = check new ();
